summaries: Repo two is planned only and remains blocked until repo one merges cleanly with evidence recorded.
The planned AO Foundry scope is one existing test file and no shared forbidden surface.
assumptions: Repo one evidence will be evaluated before any repo two import or execution.
AO Atlas does not schedule or execute repo two work.
exclusions: repo two Foundry import before stop gate
shared policy, auth, provider, release, deploy, config, secret, dependency, or public-claim surfaces
missing_context_protocol: Keep repo two blocked and return to AO Atlas if repo-one merge evidence is missing, stale, or ambiguous.
